path.description: Request path relative to the API root, e.g. `/loan-applications/app-1`.

query.description: Query parameters for the list endpoint (name → stringified value).

body.description: JSON request body for create/update (validated against `LoanApplication` at the boundary).

expectStatus.description: The pinned HTTP status this request must return.

expectTotal.description: For a list response: assert the total match count.

expectIds.description: For a list response: assert the returned record ids in deterministic order.

expectErrorCode.description: For a 4xx response: assert the error `code`.

description:
One request of an API-contract **conformance vector** (build plan 4.2, harness-first). Drives the
generated BFF and pins the expected HTTP status; positive requests pin the returned record id /
version or list ids / total, negative requests pin the boundary-rejection error code (the runtime
JSON-Schema validation firing at the edge).
